_doc: Centralized timing config for skills. Values in seconds. Decrement by 1s each run until failure, then bump back +1s to converge on optimal.

quit-game._note: Sleep after wineserver -k before proceeding. Was 15, testing lower.

start-tactical-engine._note: Sleep before first status curl after launching tactical engine. Was 5.

wait-for-bridge._note: Interval between bridge poll attempts. Max wait = poll_interval * max_attempts.

tactical-chain._note: Waits between DevConsole commands to reach tactical. Was 12/15/15/15. endturn was 14, lowered to 7.
